title: gymnanthelia commutata
intro: Gymnanthelia commutata, also known as the native Hawaiian plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a shrub-like plant that has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting immune function. Gymnanthelia commutata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to treat a range of ailments.
